== Notes for [[Item:Q110249|Q110249]] ==

ID: I180876

Name: Qarais ibn Abbad , Emir of Seville 1

Sex: M

Name: Qarais ibn Abbad 1

Birth: ABT 918 in Seville, Spain 1

Event: Relationship (J,M&L) 34th Great-grandparent 1

Father: Abbad ibn Amr , Emir of Seville b: 883 in Seville, Spain

Marriage 1 Umm bint Isma'il al-Mansur , Princess of Egypt b: ABT 920 in Egypt

Children

Ismail ibn Qarais , Emir of Seville b: 951 in Seville, Spain

Sources:

Title: loren.ged

Repository:

Media: Other

Text: Date of Import: Apr 12, 2006

https://www.wikitree.com/wiki/Espa%C3%B1a_Musulm%C3%A1n-1

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
